title: malvastrum americanum
intro: Malvastrum americanum, also known as American hollyhock, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It is known for its tall spikes of showy flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malvastrum americanum include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to calm digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems.
